title: Bit manipulation
summary: 9618 — binary shifts, masks, and logical bitwise operations.
learningObjectives: Use bit manipulation in flag checking.

simpleExplanation.title: Working at bit level
simpleExplanation.summary: Programs manipulate individual bits for efficiency, permissions, and low-level hardware control.
steps: AND with mask to test a bit.
OR to set bits; XOR to toggle.

sections.content: **Bit manipulation** (4.3) builds on **1.1 binary** and **3.2 logic gates**. Trace **8-bit examples** on paper.
